examples.title: Pseudocode: Compiler Structure
examples.description: Demonstrates the two-part structure of a compiler
examples.code:
BEGIN
 ANALYSIS PHASE
 LEXICAL ANALYSIS
 SYNTAX ANALYSIS
 SEMANTIC ANALYSIS
 SYNTHESIS PHASE
 INTERMEDIATE CODE GENERATION
 CODE OPTIMIZATION
 CODE GENERATION
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode illustrates the two main phases of a compiler: analysis and synthesis.

examples.title: Python: Interpreter Example
examples.description: A simple interpreter example in Python
examples.explanation: This Python code demonstrates a basic interpreter that tokenizes and executes a simple 'print' statement.
